title: salix × neuburgensis
intro: Salix × neuburgensis, a hybrid willow plant, is a cross between Salix alba (white willow) and Salix fragilis (crack willow). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, making it a potential remedy for pain relief and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Salix × neuburgensis include its ability to soothe menstrual cramps, lower fevers, and provide relief from headaches. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, allowing users to reap its medicinal benefits in a convenient and accessible way.
